Localization.Description: Successful POST request to the Confluence function "Add a new language" in the "Code" macro settings section from an authenticated user. This may indicate the exploitation of vulnerability CVE-2024-21683, which allows arbitrary code to be executed on the Confluence server host.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A successful POST request from host {src.ip}:{src.port} to the "Add a new language" Confluence function in the "Code" macro settings section as user "{object.account.name}" on host {event_src.host}.
